description: You have been handed ownership of an inbox organization project that was started by a departing colleague but never finished. Two folders already exist: 'Security-Discussion' (with emails about spam filtering and security topics) and 'Hardware-Issues' (with emails about RAID, Solaris, and hardware problems). Organize the 40+ unsorted emails in the inbox by creating at least 3 additional folders for distinct categories identified in the remaining emails. Move all remaining inbox emails into these folders to achieve inbox zero (no more than 5 emails remaining). Compose an email to project-director@devteam.com with the subject 'Inbox Organization Complete - Final Status' listing all 5 folders (the 2 existing plus your 3+ new ones), their email counts, and a one-sentence description of each folder's content type. Login: username ga, password password123.
